product_basic_kyc.product_name: Tatsya Premium Marble Rectangular Cutting Board with Floral Inlay
product_basic_kyc.product_category: Home & Kitchen > Kitchen & Dining > Cutting Boards & Chopping Blocks
product_basic_kyc.target_audience: Indian homemakers, chefs, and kitchen enthusiasts looking for elegant and durable kitchen accessories
product_basic_kyc.primary_use_case: Food preparation, cutting and chopping vegetables, fruits, and meats
secondary_use_cases: Serving platter for snacks or appetizers
Gifting item for housewarming and festive occasions
product_basic_kyc.occasion_based_usage: Daily kitchen use and special occasions like Indian festivals (Diwali, Raksha Bandhan) and traditional family gatherings

indian_context_product_theme.cultural_relevance: Marble cutting board with intricate floral inlay reflects Indian artisan craft and aesthetics, appealing to buyers who appreciate handcrafted kitchenware
indian_context_product_theme.how_indian_customer_uses_product: Used daily in Indian kitchens for preparing traditional meals, vegetable chopping, and as an elegant serving tray during festivals and family events
indian_context_product_theme.lifestyle_theme: Premium yet functional kitchenware that blends traditional Indian artistry with modern kitchen needs, fitting well in urban and semi-urban Indian homes
indian_context_product_theme.emotional_practical_value: Provides a sense of pride in owning a beautiful, sturdy kitchen tool that enhances the cooking experience while adding sophistication to the kitchen décor

amazon_listing_strategy.ideal_amazon_title: Tatsya Premium Marble Cutting Board with Handcrafted Floral Inlay – Durable, Elegant Kitchen Serving & Chopping Board
bullet_points: Premium Natural Marble: Crafted from high-quality marble for durability and superior cutting surface.
Unique Floral Inlay: Handcrafted flower motifs in brass and copper enhance kitchen aesthetics.
Multi-Purpose Use: Ideal for chopping vegetables and serving snacks during Indian festivities.
Easy to Clean & Maintain: Smooth surface resists stains and odors, perfect for daily kitchen use.
Elegant Gift Choice: Perfect housewarming or festive gift reflecting Indian craftsmanship.
amazon_listing_strategy.short_product_description: Enhance your kitchen with the Tatsya Premium Marble Cutting Board, featuring exquisite handcrafted floral inlays. Made with natural marble, this durable and elegant board is perfect for everyday chopping and serving, blending traditional Indian artistry with modern functionality.
a_plus_content_section_ideas: Craftsmanship Showcase - Close-up visuals of floral brass and copper inlays highlighting intricate detailing
Material Quality - Images of smooth marble surface emphasizing durability and easy maintenance
Usage Scenarios - Depictions of cutting vegetables, serving snacks in modern Indian kitchen settings
Gift & Festive Appeal - Lifestyle imagery featuring the board as a gift during Indian festivals
Care Instructions - Simple infographic showing cleaning and maintenance tips

requirement_criteria_for_image_generatio.product_constraints: Maintain exact product design, shape, white marble color, and floral brass & copper inlays with Tatsya branding intact, no alteration in visual detailing.
recommended_image_angles: Top-down view focusing on full rectangle shape
Lifestyle scene showing product in use
recommended_real_life_environments: Modern Indian kitchen countertop with natural lighting
Festive kitchen décor with Indian elements (e.g., diyas, flowers)
Serving snacks during family gathering setup
Homemaker chopping vegetables in urban kitchen
indian_lifestyle_settings: Diwali or festival food preparation background
Traditional Indian kitchen with brass utensils
Modern Indian flat kitchen with minimal décor
Floral or ethnic Indian textile accents nearby
requirement_criteria_for_image_generatio.lighting_requirements: Use soft, natural or warm daylight lighting to enhance marble texture and metallic inlay shine, avoid harsh shadows, ensure realistic reflection and ambient warm tones.
requirement_criteria_for_image_generatio.amazon_a_plus_look: Clean, minimalist background with premium feel, soft shadows, neutral colors that make product and inlay details the visual focus, consistent high-quality finish.

suitable_backgrounds: Off-white or light beige smooth surface
Plain textured cotton or linen cloth in warm tones
lifestyle_scenarios: Chopping fresh Indian vegetables like tomatoes, onions, coriander
Serving Indian snacks like samosas or namkeen during festival
Usage by homemaker in modern kitchen with Indian décor
Gift exchange during Diwali or wedding ceremony
Close-up hand interaction showing use and size
image_generation_guidance.text_placement_areas: Top right or bottom left corner away from floral inlays to keep visuals clean and unobstructed
what_must_be_avoided: Any alteration or distortion of product shape/color
Non-Indian kitchen contexts or irrelevant props
Harsh, cold lighting that flattens product texture
Close-ups that obscure floral inlay details
